name: multi-service-example
description: Next.js + gateway + axios relay + catalog, Mockifyer-enabled with one MOCKIFYER_CLIENT_ID lane

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,gateway,relay,catalog -c blue,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev -w @multi-service/web" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/gateway-api" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/relay-axios-api" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/catalog-api"
scripts.dev:record: cross-env MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true concurrently -n web,gateway,relay,catalog -c blue,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev -w @multi-service/web" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/gateway-api" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/relay-axios-api" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/catalog-api"
scripts.dev:proxy: cross-env MOCKIFYER_RUNTIME=proxy MOCKIFYER_PROXY_URL=http://localhost:3002 concurrently -n web,gateway,relay,catalog -c blue,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev -w @multi-service/web" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/gateway-api" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/relay-axios-api" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/catalog-api"
scripts.dev:proxy:record: cross-env MOCKIFYER_RUNTIME=proxy MOCKIFYER_PROXY_URL=http://localhost:3002 MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true concurrently -n web,gateway,relay,catalog -c blue,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev -w @multi-service/web" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/gateway-api" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/relay-axios-api" "npm run dev -w @multi-service/catalog-api"
